tasks.title: Forter Flip — Top 10 Riskified Merchant Target List
tasks.summary: Prioritized list of 10 Riskified merchants to target for Forter + RTN flip strategy. Tiered by value: Tier 1 (Peloton, Wayfair, Booking.com), Tier 2 (Prada, Ticketmaster, Trip.com), Tier 3 (Shein, Canada Goose, Revolve, GoPro). Includes detailed profiles, talking points for Jim Cho, and outreach sequence.

lastSummary: Overnight Mar 22-23: Forter Flip target list completed (re-run after initial sub-agent failure). 10 Riskified merchants ranked with rationale, detailed profiles, Jim Cho talking points, and 3-tier outreach prioritization. Ready for Jim's cross-reference against Checkout.com merchant list.
